subcodes.first_line: O trusted one [Amín] of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! . . . As a result of the length of my travels over land and sea, the severe hardships I have suffered night and day
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه بیست و سوم رجب ۳۳۱ رسید خدمات تو همیشه در نظر است... از طول سفر
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
